title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 04 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 04 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 04 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 04/11/2025
Today, the price of iron ore futures continued to fluctuate weakly. The main contract I2601 finally closed at 775.5 yuan, down 1.71%from the previous working day. The mainstream spot price at ports fell by 2-8 yuan/ton from the previous working day.
